title: Europe wants to rebalance trade with Beijing, but can't quit Chinese air conditioners
summary_full: An historic heat wave has driven unprecedented demand for Chinese-made air conditioners in Europe, underscoring the tough task Brussels faces in rebalancing trade with Beijing.
summary_public: An historic heat wave has driven unprecedented demand for Chinese-made air conditioners in Europe, underscoring the tough task Brussels faces in rebalancing trade with Beijing.

BE.label: neutral
BE.evidence: tough task Brussels faces in rebalancing trade with Beijing
